content: Devouring embryos only restores health, and gaining power has nothing to do with whether or not the devouring embryo is triggered

that's not quite right.
ona a normal exalt leigh gains x str, and yes the str gain happens even without devour. However on devour the str gained by leigh's exalt is doubled. So if her normal exalt would gain 18 str, if it also triggers a devour it will gain 36 str
The Flesh Realm will gain temporary power when embryo devouring is triggered for the first time each turn

Yes but the str gained from leigh has nothing to do with the first devour each turn. In the video I attached to the thread, even if it can't be seen, each leigh exalt is done after someone else in the team devoured before her
Just the description of the exalt points out, leigh gains x str, and if devour happens the str from her exalt specifically is doubled
